title: QrProfile
description: Canonical QR-code generation parameters. Every kiosk MUST use the same QrProfile to ensure that printed QR codes scan reliably across all readers and that kiosks cannot drift independently.

format.description: Payload encoding format. 'uri' means the QR content is a URI string (see uri_prefix).

uri_prefix.description: Fixed prefix prepended to every claim token to form the full QR payload URI. The kiosk MUST append only the opaque token — no extra query parameters.

error_correction.description: Reed-Solomon error correction level. 'M' (15%) is the recommended minimum for printed vouchers. Use 'Q' (25%) for high-wear environments.

module_size_mm.description: Physical size of each QR module (dark/light square) in millimetres. Must be ≥ 0.25 mm for reliable scanning from 150 mm distance.

quiet_zone_modules.description: Number of empty (white) modules around the QR symbol on all four sides. The QR spec requires ≥ 4; 4 is the minimum allowed here.
